meta_title: For Students: email automation to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to email automation and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Email Automation to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use email automation to overcome a lack of marketing skills. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale; you need a system. By automating your outreach with AI, you transform cold emails into a predictable growth engine. Using Antigravity to structure your data and Claude Code to implement the logic, you can launch a professional, automated lead generation pipeline today.
content.intro:
You’ve built the product, polished the UI, and pushed to production. Then, the silence hits. You realize that your code is brilliant, but your inbox is empty. The 'build it and they will come' fallacy is the silent killer of student projects, leaving you with a graveyard of abandoned GitHub repositories that no one ever saw.

But here is the secret: you don't need a marketing agency. You need an automated bridge between your code and your future users. By leveraging AI to handle your outreach, you turn your project into a self-sustaining loop. Let’s stop waiting for traffic and start engineering it.

steps.title: Define Your Target Audience Schema
steps.description: Before automating, you must structure your prospect data. We use Antigravity to define a clean JSON schema for your potential users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust JSON schema for a target audience database. Include fields for name, email, company, persona_type, and a 'pain_point_trigger' field for personalized outreach.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --schema audience_schema.json --description 'defines target user profile for outreach'

steps.title: Develop the Outreach Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write a script that fetches your target data and prepares personalized email templates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Python script using the audience schema that maps each user to a personalized email template based on their specific pain point trigger.

steps.title: Integrate Email Service Provider
steps.description: Connect your logic to an API like SendGrid or Resend to ensure your emails actually land in the inbox.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean integration module for the Resend API that handles batch email sending with error logging and rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add-dependency resend && claude commit 'added email service integration'

steps.title: Build the Automated Scheduler
steps.description: Set up a cron job or a cloud function to trigger your outreach script automatically at optimal times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a configuration file for a GitHub Action that triggers the python email script every Monday at 9 AM EST.

steps.title: Monitor and Iterate
steps.description: Implement a simple logging mechanism to track which subject lines convert to clicks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a logging function that records email status and click-through rates in a local CSV file for performance analysis.

pro_tips: Never send from a personal Gmail; use a dedicated domain to protect your primary email's sender reputation.
Always include a 'P.S.' in your emails; it is statistically the most read part of any cold outreach message.
Focus on 'low-friction' calls to action, such as asking for feedback rather than a direct sales pitch.
Warm up your domain by sending a few manual emails to friends before triggering the automated system.
Use A/B testing on subject lines by splitting your audience list into two equal cohorts.
content.next_steps: After deployment, spend 15 minutes each day reviewing your logs. If your open rate is below 20%, iterate on your subject lines. Use the data you've gathered to build a dashboard in your portfolio to showcase your 'Growth Engineering' skills to future employers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to scale any project you build. Don't let your code go unseen—take control of your project's destiny. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
